response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed intro screen at 00:00. 2. Identified the main performance as 'Soirée' (ソワレ) from the on-screen text. 3. Used search to identify 'Nanahoshi Orchestra' as the composer/lyricist. 4. Found official lyrics on Lyrical Nonsense and confirmed them. 5. Mapped the scenes: performance, post-song interaction/hallway walk, and the dressing room phone call.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song 'Soirée' by the VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei. It includes the live performance, her interaction with the band after the song, and a behind-the-scenes walk to her dressing room where she makes a phone call, concluding the segment.

scenes.description: A brief title/intro screen with the text '#星街すいせい重大発表LIVE'. No vocal music is playing.
Hoshimachi Suisei performs the song 'Soirée' on stage with a live band. The song title 'ソワレ' appears in the top-left corner.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If you fold up that twilight, it's silence.
In our town, the darkness is a signal.
Turn off the lights, let's begin, let the curtains open.
Look up and make a wish, just like you.
I want to stay as I am.
The veil of sparkling,
Drawing a shooting star on my eyes,
The twinkling soirée, it's now!
Steal a glance at the sun as it breathes in its sleep.
It's a great escape, let's run away.
If you insert a bookmark to cross the morning sky,
We must go, soirée,
Until the night dawns.
Just a little longer, like this.
That bell sound doesn't stop even if the twilight shines.
It's time, let's gather, send applause and cheers to our ambition.
To you who listen to the story of the future with a lonely look,
I swear, even if there is no magic in the world,
The dream will continue.
As if replacing 'goodnight',
Deliver the melody that won't stop ringing.
Don't miss it, soirée, we are the witnesses.
Reached out my hand to the blue sky.
Even if the horizon takes a nap,
Once you cross the bridge that connects the days endlessly,
Someday, soirée, until it reaches you.
Call out my voice, any number of times.
(Star tail) Following the unending trajectory.
(Star tale) To the end of many years, anywhere.
Even the tragedy that can't be told in one night,
If we can talk all through the night,
It becomes a comedy.
(Star tail) Let me hear it.
(Star tail) A single streak of
(Star tale)
The twinkling soirée, it's now!
Steal a glance at the sun as it breathes in its sleep.
It's a great escape, let's run away.
If you insert a bookmark to cross the morning sky,
It's a promise, soirée, until I fall asleep.
I'll see you again tomorrow, any number of times.
Dear, soirée,
Our story that will be passed on to you.

scenes.description: The song ends, and Suisei bows to the audience. The band applauds. She walks off stage through a door and down a hallway towards her dressing room, interacting with staff along the way.
Suisei enters her dressing room, looks in the mirror, and makes a phone call to someone. The segment ends as she finishes the call and the screen goes dark.
